name: Qingdao Haier Biomedical Co., Ltd.
summary: Qingdao Haier Biomedical Co., Ltd. engages in the design, manufacture, marketing, and sale of low temperature storage equipment for biomedical samples worldwide. The company offers preservation equipment, biological safety cabinets, liquid nitrogen containers, cryogenic supplies, and CO2 incubators, as well as WHO/PQS certificated equipment. It provides storage solutions for biological sample banks and medical supplies, as well as blood, vaccine, and reagent safety. The company was founded in 2005 and is based in Qingdao, China.
